title: taraxacum montanum
intro: Taraxacum montanum, also known as the Mountain Dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum montanum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support liver function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots can also be used to make a coffee substitute, making it a versatile and valuable medicinal plant.
